name: Cyber Security 1 AB (publ)
summary: Cyber Security 1 AB (publ) provides cyber resilience solutions in Africa, the Middle East, Europe, and the United Arab Emirates. It operates in three segments: Value Added Distribution; Advisory Services; and MSSP/ Managed Services. The company also offers security, risk, and compliance solutions for payment, communication, network, and e-commerce security. In addition, it provides penetration testing, application security audit, information systems security audit, data loss prevention, and network security services. Further, the company offers MSSP/Managed services, such as data, network, and gateway securities; and managed compliance and SIEM services, incident response, and business continuity and cyber forensics. It serves public and private sector organizations, including government, healthcare, retail, insurance, manufacturing, and hospitality. The company was formerly known as Cognosec AB (publ) and changed its name to Cyber Security 1 AB (publ) in July 2018. Cyber Security 1 AB (publ) was incorporated in 1970 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
